prose: Frontier-orbital single-point calculation on aniline (C₆H₅NH₂, 14 atoms). Method: DFT, tier 'standard' — B3LYP/def2-TZVP (density-fit, PySCF RKS), gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1.
